message:
🐛 Add fetchInProgress guard to useCertManager and useLLMd hooks (#2125)

Same queue flooding fix as PR #2124 applied to the remaining hooks
that lacked re-entrancy guards: useCertManager, useLLMdServers, and
useLLMdModels. Without the guard, concurrent refetch calls from
auto-refresh timers and effect re-runs flood the kubectl proxy queue.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
